schema.title: DinkVision data lineage and utilization ledger

paths.role: 13-video teacher export inventory; pixels for 11 videos remain VM-only
local compare-only video 83gyqyc10y8f
local allowed video xkadsq9bli3h
eight court-review stills from compare-only video 83gyqyc10y8f; separate from the four protected eval clips

counts.byte_count_basis: 142904609 gallery-export bytes plus two local MP4s (119911668 and 61628656) plus 1093055 bytes in eight 83gyqyc10y8f court-review stills; 2390645811 VM-only pixel bytes excluded

games: one pb.vision game per video ID
fork_families: one family per pb.vision video ID

rights.posture: PBV-FULL-USAGE-20260720: owner-signed full training/commercial grant for ten non-holdout pixel sources; predictions remain teacher-only

BALL.ruling: Ten non-holdout pixel sources may train; teacher ball labels require independent agreement and low weight.

COURT.ruling: Ten non-holdout pixels may support preview experiments; teacher keypoints are not GT.

EVENT.ruling: Ten non-holdout pixels may train; predictions are teacher-only and audio alone cannot establish eligibility.

PERSON.ruling: Ten non-holdout pixels may train; three compare-only videos may only form the judge.

REID.ruling: Teacher crop use requires manual precision gate; three compare-only videos are judge-only.

identities.ruling: Permanent pb.vision compare-only ID and every derivative.
Permanent pb.vision compare-only ID and every derivative.
Permanent pb.vision compare-only ID and every derivative.

overlap_check_coverage.method: exact video ID denylist
overlap_check_coverage.scope: all registered video IDs; no immutable clean subset selector is registered

partitions.strategy: seven train, two teacher-val, one teacher-test, three permanent compare-only test identities

consumers.command: scripts/racketsport/build_pbvision_event_corpus.py (exact historical argv not preserved in the inventory)

command_config_hash.role: consumer result record; launch argv hash was not recorded

assets.state_reason: All 13 JSON exports were inventoried and ten entered the teacher materializer; local pixel availability remains only 2/13.
assets.next_check: Stage and hash the eleven VM-only MP4s; keep the three compare IDs unread by trainers.

counts.byte_count_basis: sum of 9 files under the corpus directory

fork_families: one family per pb.vision video ID

COURT.ruling: This asset contains event windows, not court GT.

PERSON.ruling: No person-training ruling for this event corpus.

REID.ruling: No identity-training ruling for this event corpus.

identities.ruling: All three are excluded from this corpus and remain permanent compare-only.

overlap_check_coverage.scope: ten corpus video families; declared corpus path is not bound to an immutable clean subset selector

assets.next_check: Materialize corrected non-audio-agreement B/C rows after all media and PTS hashes are local.
